title: Time Preposition Combinations
description: Practice two time-related prepositional phrases in each sentence.

questions.sentence: The library opens ___ 9:00 ___ weekdays.
questions.completedSentence: The library opens at 9:00 on weekdays.
questions.japanese: 図書館は平日の9時に開館する。

questions.sentence: We studied ___ two hours ___ dinner.
questions.completedSentence: We studied for two hours before dinner.
questions.japanese: 夕食前に2時間勉強した。

questions.sentence: Submit the form ___ Friday ___ 5:00.
questions.completedSentence: Submit the form by Friday at 5:00.
questions.japanese: 金曜日の5時までに用紙を提出すること。

questions.sentence: The café stays open ___ midnight ___ Fridays.
questions.completedSentence: The café stays open until midnight on Fridays.
questions.japanese: そのカフェは金曜日には深夜まで営業している。

questions.sentence: I have lived here ___ 2022 ___ my first university year.
questions.completedSentence: I have lived here since 2022 during my first university year.
questions.japanese: 大学1年目だった2022年からここに住んでいる。

questions.sentence: We met ___ class ___ the afternoon.
questions.completedSentence: We met after class in the afternoon.
questions.japanese: 午後、授業後に会った。

questions.sentence: No one spoke ___ the exam ___ the break.
questions.completedSentence: No one spoke during the exam until the break.
questions.japanese: 休憩まで試験中は誰も話さなかった。

questions.sentence: She practiced ___ an hour ___ lunch.
questions.completedSentence: She practiced for an hour after lunch.
questions.japanese: 昼食後に1時間練習した。

questions.sentence: The office is closed ___ Sundays ___ August.
questions.completedSentence: The office is closed on Sundays during August.
questions.japanese: 事務室は8月中の日曜日には閉まっている。

questions.sentence: Finish the report ___ Monday ___ the meeting.
questions.completedSentence: Finish the report by Monday before the meeting.
questions.japanese: 会議前の月曜日までにレポートを終えること。

questions.sentence: The train arrived ___ noon ___ a short delay.
questions.completedSentence: The train arrived at noon after a short delay.
questions.japanese: 列車は少し遅れた後、正午に到着した。

questions.sentence: We waited ___ 10:00 ___ breakfast.
questions.completedSentence: We waited until 10:00 after breakfast.
questions.japanese: 朝食後、10時まで待った。

questions.sentence: The festival begins ___ April ___ the spring break.
questions.completedSentence: The festival begins in April after the spring break.
questions.japanese: その祭りは春休み後の4月に始まる。

questions.sentence: The shop opens ___ 8:00 and closes ___ 6:00.
questions.completedSentence: The shop opens at 8:00 and closes at 6:00.
questions.japanese: その店は8時に開き、6時に閉まる。

questions.sentence: He has worked here ___ May ___ six months.
questions.completedSentence: He has worked here since May for six months.
questions.japanese: 彼は5月から6か月間ここで働いている。

questions.sentence: We arrived ___ noon ___ Monday.
questions.completedSentence: We arrived before noon on Monday.
questions.japanese: 月曜日の正午前に到着した。

questions.sentence: The course begins ___ September and ends ___ December.
questions.completedSentence: The course begins in September and ends in December.
questions.japanese: その授業は9月に始まり、12月に終わる。

questions.sentence: She read ___ an hour ___ bed.
questions.completedSentence: She read for an hour before bed.
questions.japanese: 寝る前に1時間読書した。

questions.sentence: The deadline is ___ Thursday ___ noon.
questions.completedSentence: The deadline is on Thursday at noon.
questions.japanese: 締め切りは木曜日の正午である。

questions.sentence: We stayed inside ___ the storm ___ three hours.
questions.completedSentence: We stayed inside during the storm for three hours.
questions.japanese: 嵐の間、3時間屋内にいた。

questions.sentence: I have known Ken ___ 2020 ___ high school.
questions.completedSentence: I have known Ken since 2020 during high school.
questions.japanese: 高校時代の2020年からケンを知っている。

questions.sentence: The first bus leaves ___ 6:00, and the last leaves ___ midnight.
questions.completedSentence: The first bus leaves at 6:00, and the last leaves at midnight.
questions.japanese: 始発バスは6時に出発し、最終バスは深夜に出発する。

questions.sentence: We will meet ___ lunch ___ Tuesday.
questions.completedSentence: We will meet after lunch on Tuesday.
questions.japanese: 火曜日の昼食後に会う予定である。

questions.sentence: Submit the form ___ Friday ___ class.
questions.completedSentence: Submit the form by Friday before class.
questions.japanese: 授業前の金曜日までに用紙を提出すること。

questions.sentence: The museum is free ___ July ___ the festival.
questions.completedSentence: The museum is free in July during the festival.
questions.japanese: その博物館は7月の祭りの期間中、無料である。

questions.sentence: She slept ___ the flight ___ two hours.
questions.completedSentence: She slept during the flight for two hours.
questions.japanese: 彼女は飛行中に2時間眠った。

questions.sentence: The store remained open ___ midnight ___ New Year's Eve.
questions.completedSentence: The store remained open until midnight on New Year's Eve.
questions.japanese: その店は大みそかには深夜まで営業していた。

questions.sentence: We practiced ___ class ___ dinner.
questions.completedSentence: We practiced after class before dinner.
questions.japanese: 授業後、夕食前に練習した。

questions.sentence: The exam starts ___ 10:30 ___ the morning.
questions.completedSentence: The exam starts at 10:30 in the morning.
questions.japanese: 試験は午前10時30分に始まる。

questions.sentence: He has waited ___ noon ___ the announcement.
questions.completedSentence: He has waited since noon for the announcement.
questions.japanese: 彼は正午から発表を待っている。

questions.sentence: The meeting is ___ Friday ___ 3:00.
questions.completedSentence: The meeting is on Friday at 3:00.
questions.japanese: 会議は金曜日の3時にある。

questions.sentence: We worked ___ the afternoon ___ three hours.
questions.completedSentence: We worked during the afternoon for three hours.
questions.japanese: 午後に3時間働いた。

questions.sentence: Please arrive ___ 9:00 ___ the presentation.
questions.completedSentence: Please arrive by 9:00 before the presentation.
questions.japanese: 発表前の9時までに到着すること。

questions.sentence: She has studied English ___ 2021 ___ university.
questions.completedSentence: She has studied English since 2021 during university.
questions.japanese: 彼女は大学在学中の2021年から英語を勉強している。

questions.sentence: I called him ___ dinner ___ Sunday.
questions.completedSentence: I called him after dinner on Sunday.
questions.japanese: 日曜日の夕食後に彼に電話した。

questions.sentence: The lights remained lit ___ midnight ___ the event.
questions.completedSentence: The lights remained lit until midnight during the event.
questions.japanese: その行事中、照明は深夜までついていた。

questions.sentence: We rested ___ an hour ___ the hike.
questions.completedSentence: We rested for an hour after the hike.
questions.japanese: ハイキング後に1時間休んだ。

questions.sentence: The café closes ___ 7:00 ___ winter.
questions.completedSentence: The café closes at 7:00 in winter.
questions.japanese: そのカフェは冬には7時に閉まる。

questions.sentence: Read the instructions ___ the test ___ class.
questions.completedSentence: Read the instructions before the test during class.
questions.japanese: 授業中、試験前に説明を読むこと。

questions.sentence: We met ___ noon ___ the library closed.
questions.completedSentence: We met at noon before the library closed.
questions.japanese: 図書館が閉まる前の正午に会った。

questions.sentence: The team practiced ___ two weeks ___ the tournament.
questions.completedSentence: The team practiced for two weeks before the tournament.
questions.japanese: チームは大会前に2週間練習した。

questions.sentence: The office is busy ___ April ___ registration week.
questions.completedSentence: The office is busy in April during registration week.
questions.japanese: 事務室は4月の履修登録期間中、忙しい。

questions.sentence: The package should arrive ___ Tuesday ___ noon.
questions.completedSentence: The package should arrive by Tuesday at noon.
questions.japanese: 荷物は火曜日の正午までに届くはずである。

questions.sentence: She waited ___ 5:00 ___ class.
questions.completedSentence: She waited until 5:00 after class.
questions.japanese: 彼女は授業後、5時まで待った。

questions.sentence: I have used this app ___ Monday ___ every lesson.
questions.completedSentence: I have used this app since Monday during every lesson.
questions.japanese: 月曜日から毎回の授業でこのアプリを使っている。

questions.sentence: The semester begins ___ April ___ the entrance ceremony.
questions.completedSentence: The semester begins in April after the entrance ceremony.
questions.japanese: 学期は入学式後の4月に始まる。

questions.sentence: We met ___ 8:30 ___ Wednesday.
questions.completedSentence: We met at 8:30 on Wednesday.
questions.japanese: 水曜日の8時30分に会った。

questions.sentence: He studied ___ two hours ___ the exam.
questions.completedSentence: He studied for two hours before the exam.
questions.japanese: 彼は試験前に2時間勉強した。

questions.sentence: The office was quiet ___ lunch ___ the meeting.
questions.completedSentence: The office was quiet during lunch before the meeting.
questions.japanese: 会議前の昼休み中、事務室は静かだった。

questions.sentence: Submit your file ___ midnight ___ Friday.
questions.completedSentence: Submit your file by midnight on Friday.
questions.japanese: 金曜日の深夜までにファイルを提出すること。

questions.sentence: The library stays open ___ 10:00 ___ exam week.
questions.completedSentence: The library stays open until 10:00 during exam week.
questions.japanese: 図書館は試験期間中、10時まで開いている。

questions.sentence: She has lived here ___ 2023 ___ her graduate studies.
questions.completedSentence: She has lived here since 2023 during her graduate studies.
questions.japanese: 彼女は大学院在学中の2023年からここに住んでいる。

questions.sentence: We talked ___ class ___ lunch.
questions.completedSentence: We talked after class before lunch.
questions.japanese: 授業後、昼食前に話した。

questions.sentence: The train left ___ noon ___ a ten-minute wait.
questions.completedSentence: The train left at noon after a ten-minute wait.
questions.japanese: 列車は10分待った後、正午に出発した。

questions.sentence: I slept ___ nine hours ___ Sunday.
questions.completedSentence: I slept for nine hours on Sunday.
questions.japanese: 日曜日に9時間眠った。

questions.sentence: The course ends ___ July ___ the summer vacation.
questions.completedSentence: The course ends in July before the summer vacation.
questions.japanese: その授業は夏休み前の7月に終わる。

questions.sentence: The first session starts ___ 4:00, and the second starts ___ 6:00.
questions.completedSentence: The first session starts at 4:00, and the second starts at 6:00.
questions.japanese: 最初の回は4時に始まり、次の回は6時に始まる。

questions.sentence: The store is closed ___ New Year's Day ___ the morning.
questions.completedSentence: The store is closed on New Year's Day in the morning.
questions.japanese: その店は元日の午前中、閉まっている。

questions.sentence: We stayed ___ midnight ___ the ceremony.
questions.completedSentence: We stayed until midnight after the ceremony.
questions.japanese: 式典後、深夜まで残った。

questions.sentence: He has worked ___ six months ___ January.
questions.completedSentence: He has worked for six months since January.
questions.japanese: 彼は1月から6か月間働いている。
